name: Convert Google Doc to Interactive HTML
query: Convert this Google Doc to HTML: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1srxeth7iBydv8fmf0lNOEV1DEeyggBtEF0tqIhSTOa4/edit
expected_behavior: Step 1: Parse the URL to extract file ID (1srxeth7iBydv8fmf0lNOEV1DEeyggBtEF0tqIhSTOa4)
Step 3: Classify content (likely Category 7: Research & Learning)
Step 4: Generate self-contained HTML with TOC, collapsible sections, heading hierarchy
Step 6: Report file path to user
success_criteria: Skill activates when user provides a Google Doc URL
Correctly extracts file ID from the URL
Uses Google Drive MCP to fetch document content
Generated HTML preserves document structure (headings, lists, tables)
HTML is self-contained with no external dependencies
File opens correctly in a browser
